tweets.text:
I keep coming back to Oliver.

Feels risky, but that’s sort of the point with a POD mid.

If you wait until everyone is comfortable, the edge is probably gone.

Are you going there?

tweets.text:
This is not the week to get cute.

The cash cows look close to compulsory, Holmes gives you DPP flexibility, and Wilkie/DCam are getting buyable.

Build for the next 5 weeks, not one score.

Who are you bringing in?

#AFL #AFLSuperCoach #SuperCoach https://t.co/uMqpkt2YY5

tweets.text:

Go into that rnd 16 bye with an extra premo and get after.. 💭 

Thoughts ?
